description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to build pwsafe with CMake on macOS. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and allow manual triggering. It should use a macOS-latest job with read permission to repository contents, and perform a series of steps including setting build parameters, installing dependencies, building libyubikey and ykpers from upstream, caching and building wxWidgets, generating Xcode project with CMake, building pwsafe, running tests, creating a DMG, and uploading the DMG as an artifact.
